tipRules.tip: Yamamoto pro Hite: The Yamamoto Zako is the perfect ChatterBait trailer — bigger profile, good but subtle action, and an 'accordion-style' tail that collapses when fish bite, increasing hook-up ratio

knowledge.insight: Yamamoto pro Hite: Hite designed the Zako for Yamamoto specifically as a ChatterBait/Jack Hammer trailer. The accordion-style tail collapse on the bite is the key feature for better hookup ratios
